name: gsap
description: GSAP is a framework-agnostic JavaScript animation library that turns developers into animation superheroes. Build high-performance animations that work in **every** major browser. Animate CSS, SVG, canvas, React, Vue, WebGL, colors, strings, motion paths,
license: Standard 'no charge' license: http://greensock.com/standard-license. Club GreenSock members get more: http://greensock.com/licensing/. Why GreenSock doesn't employ an MIT license: http://greensock.com/why-license/
